# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    cors:
    - maxAgeSeconds: 3600
      methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
      - HEAD
      origin:
      - "*"
      responseHeader:
      - "*"
    defaultObjectAcl:
    - entity: project-owners
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-editors
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-viewers
      role: READER
    - entity: allUsers
      role: READER
    - entity: allAuthenticatedUsers
      role: READER
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    labels:
      application: backup
      environment: production
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
      logObjectPrefix: ""
    retentionPolicy:
      isLocked: false
      retentionPeriod: 0
    siteVerification:
      - site: ""
        verificationMethod: ""
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: ""
      notFoundPage: ""
    etag: ""
    id: ""
    kind: ""
    selfLink: ""
    timeCreated: ""
    updated: ""
